lastReleaseMessage: Rebuild the HUD to the artist's concept layout, using every asset from her UI drop: a new signal-driven top bar with the menu/pause/speed icon trio, the four-day Timeline with its sliding progress indicator, and the Sonic Pressure Tracker gauge (live SP readout, sources-panel click-through, camera zoom circles); the bottom strip gains the BUILD header plate, the pipe-frame center panel, per-resource button plates, and a portrait frame. Node couplings repointed in place with hud.gd at its exact line cap.

barRaise.topFinding: Carry-forward pass: the skip-unchanged gate fired. Zero commits since the 2026-07-14 full pass (HEAD still v0.59.39 / 549e0d4, 2026-07-13), working tree clean, no open BLOCK, no movement on BR's work-queue items, and the last full fan-out was only yesterday. Both hard rules re-verified cheap: GDD ends with </html>, no Order-42/alien-portal strings in source/. No lenses were spawned. Health holds at 82 and no lens score moved. Every open finding aged one run; game-design-04 crossed the chronic threshold, so all 23 open findings are now chronic (5+ runs). The two structural HIGHs are unchanged and still own the top of the list: the untested pathfinder/collision core (reliability-01) and the non-crash-safe save (data-integrity-01), neither of which the recent art/UI commits touched. Five standing tensions aged; cost-economics-vs-reliability (git-LFS) is at 16 runs and past due for an ADR. Next full pass fires on the next commit or 2026-07-21, whichever is first.

actions.title: Add headless tests driving pathfinder.find_path, can_traverse, and _heap_pop plus the SpatialIndex bucket queries against a stub grid, asserting optimal-path output, heap ordering, and partial-path fallback.
Make the save write crash-safe: temp path, readback-parse, copy the slot to .bak, rename the verified temp over the slot; apply to the autosave-on-quit path too.
Make M1 completion honest in .project-context.json: populate completion.remaining[] with the real external-blocked residual and set pct to match, or state exactly why it stays 50%.
Add pathfinder and spatial_index coverage to run_tests.gd: a MAX_EXPANSIONS partial-path assertion and a get_units_near / get_buildings_near exact-membership assertion.
Rewrite the GODOT_BEST_PRACTICES_ADHERENCE.md section-1 and section-10 narratives so they stop describing the god-files at pre-decomposition sizes in the present tense.
Refresh docs/ARCHITECTURE.md to v0.59.39: correct the line counts, add the wave-2 modules, resolve the Scout base contradiction.
Apply the 2>&1 stderr guard to the bare git calls in push-to-github.ps1 and publish-gdd.ps1, mirroring write-dashboard-status.ps1:237.

Convert the god-file guard in check_best_practices.py:23-30 from a hardcoded six-name list to a size threshold over all source/**/*.gd, then baseline building.gd, wave_director.gd, settings.gd, enemy_pool.gd.
Add docs/LICENSES.md recording the Spine editor license tier, the spine-godot version and source, the target Godot build, the DLL redistribution terms, and the commissioned-art ownership terms.
Add a headless save round-trip test to run_tests.gd (seed, save, clear, load, assert state survives, plus a corrupt-JSON negative case).
Capture one peak-wave (day-28 horde) frame profile on the current v0.59.39 build and log FPS plus top costs in docs/OPTIMIZATION_LOG.md.
Extend the preship gauntlet with a deterministic runtime-contract test of slide_move, apply_safe_push, and push_edge_ok against a stub grid.
Add a Shipping section to CLAUDE.md documenting the release.ps1 stderr-abort symptom and the verify-HEAD-then-finish-via-Bash recovery.
Create the hazard catalog at the path .project-context.json:58 advertises, or repoint or remove the field, and add a hazards section to CLAUDE.md.
Clamp or reject out-of-bounds restored tiles on grid-size mismatch in save_load.gd:382-398 rather than only push_warning.
Delete the dead ASSET_SCALE_MASTER read from scripts/check_playability.py and strike it from RENDER_SCALING.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and SPINE-INTEGRATION.md.
Rescope the no_hbh_cross_contamination check string to source/ so the hard-rule gate can actually pass and actually block.
Replace the two em-dash entities on the YaE-side brackish-rising gate page and extend the voice gate to cover the gate markup.
Reconcile the GDD Assets tab data-asset-default values per-row against ART_INTEGRATION_NOTES.md so the tracker stops understating the landed art.
Route enemy_base.gd:794-815 target-acquisition through get_units_near and get_buildings_near instead of walking the full group arrays per enemy.
Validate restored tiles against iso_grid.is_in_bounds before instantiation in save_load.gd:513-558.
Parse the newest CANONICAL_AUDIT-*.md for high, medium, and low counts in write-dashboard-status.ps1:169 so audit.findings stops rendering 0/0/0.
Correct the unit.gd:37-38 header to the live 256px native-1.0x model and sweep the inherited HBH version stamps from source/.
